white-widow.genetics: Brazilian sativa x South Indian indica
white-widow.source: Classic Green House attribution; individual seed lines may differ.

blue-dream.source: Widely reported; Santa Cruz medical-era selections vary by breeder.

og-kush.source: Multiple origin stories; treat as approximate.

sour-diesel.source: East Coast lore; exact parents debated.

jack-herer.genetics: Haze hybrid × Northern Lights #5 × Shiva Skunk

gelato.source: Cookie Fam lineage commonly used for Gelato lines.

zkittlez.source: Commonly cited for original Zkittlez; phenotypes vary.
